name: Anything
description:
This bot will create any roleplay scenario you want, simply type it in with the format you want and it will copy it and make a scenario with characters.

UPDATE LOGS:

12th of march 2025: I improved the creativity of the bot and highlighted and improved it's ability to copy the style of the messages, it should also now create unique characters on its own unless explicitly told not to create characters and/or tell it to stick with these characters. Scenario layering should be improved now too (where you take multiple messages to create a scenario, intended for large scenario like movie and game universes) LLM doesn't know anything about movies, tv shows, or videogames so use scenario layering and provide the characters with a small description of you want the bot to invent/complete the rest of their personality.

It took a good hour to make the changes, the words defining how the character should behave and make scenarios aren't many but I had to find the exact words that click with the AI and test them. And thanks so much for 10k messages! 🥳❤️
creator: Phelo
